SpTU 1, 075 [Šumma Alu][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] E₂ ⸢DINGIR⸣ [...]

[...] god's temple [...]

flake 2'2'

[...] DINGIR-MEŠ x [...]

[...] gods [...]

flake 3'3'

[...] IGI x [...]

[...] ... [...]

flake 4'4'

[...] ⸢QA E₂⸣ x x [...]

[...] ... house ... [...]

flake 5'5'

[...] x x x ⸢GIR₃? BAL⸣ [...]

[...] ... foot ... [...]

flake 6'6'

[...] [ir?]-ta-ka-bu E₂ DINGIR BI x [...]

[...] are mounting each other: that god's temple ... [...].

flake 7'7'

[...] ⸢i⸣-tak-ka-⸢lu⸣ KU₅as [...]

[...] are eating each other: dividing [...].

flake 8'8'

[...] ik-tap-pi-lu E₂ DINGIR BI [...]

[...] are intertwining with each other: that god's temple [...].

flake 9'9'

[...] ⸢E₂ DINGIR⸣ [d]NIN.KILIM GAZ-šu₂ LU₂ x ME [...]

[...] the god's temple, a mongoose kills it: a man ... [...].

flake 10'10'

[...] ina E₂ DINGIR [x?] ⸢SA⸣.A GAZ-šu₂ LUGAL KUR BI [...]

[...] in the god's temple, a cat kills it: the king of that land [...].

flake 11'11'

[...] ina E₂ DINGIR ⸢SA⸣.A u₂-⸢ḫar!(PAR-)ri-is-su LUGAL KUR BI [...]

[...] in the god's temple, a cat scratches it: the king of that land [...].

flake 12'12'

[...] ina E₂ DINGIR SA.⸢A⸣ GU₇!-šu₂ NIN.DINGIR.RA [...]

[...] in the god's temple, a cat eats it: a high priestess [...].

flake 13'13'

[...] x ina E₂ DINGIR ⸢GIR₃?⸣ DINGIR DU.DU LUGAL KUR-su [...]

[...] in the god's temple, it roams about at the god's foot: the king [...] his land [...].

flake 14'14'

[...] x ina SAG.DU DINGIR ⸢BI⸣ RI LUGAL KUR-su [...]

[...] on the god's head ...: the king [...] his land [...].

flake 15'15'

[...] ana UGU DINGIR ⸢ŠUBut⸣ NUN [...]

[...] it falls from the top of the god('s head): the prince [...].

flake 16'16'

[...] x DINGIR ⸢NIGIN?⸣mi NUN [...]

[...] it is circling around [...] god: the prince [...].

flake 17'17'

[...] x DINGIR x x [...]

[...] ... a god ... [...].

flake 18'18'

[...] DINGIR ⸢NIGIN⸣ x [...]

[...] it is circling around ... god ... [...].

flake 19'19'

[...] DINGIR x [...]

[...] a god ... [...].

(rest of surface missing)
